The medications prescribed (Send 500mg Vial, Syringe (Neonatal) *D5W*, NEO*IV*Ampicillin Sodium, NEO*IV*Gentamicin) are all standard treatments for neonatal infectious/prophylactic care. Furthermore, there is no mention of lipid-lowering pharmacotherapy (like statins) or any other explicit evidence of an existing lipid abnormality in the current record. According to the [Refined Criteria], explicit diagnostic evidence is prioritized over inferred risk factors or general clinical risk. Since the current record lacks this explicit evidence, the prediction for the next hospital visit is "No".
